info.name: Driver Network — UC2-B Auto-Rickshaw Recruitment (Reputation Fast-Track)
info.description:
## Driver Network — UC2-B: Auto-Rickshaw Recruitment (Reputation Fast-Track)

**Scenario:** Namma Yatri Fleet Operations (Operator) searches for auto-rickshaw drivers with reputation score ≥ 4.5 on DriverPassport-Network. High reputation score fast-tracks the hiring — no formal interview required. Offer issued after licence verification only.

**Protocol:** Beckn v2.0.0 + DriverCandidateProfileResource v2.1
**BAP:** Operator Platform (Namma Yatri)  |  **BPP:** Driver Platform (AutoConnect)
**Category:** driver-candidate  |  **Role:** AUTO_DRIVER  |  **Employment:** GIG/DAILY

### PII Audit — Candidate Profiles
The on_discover catalog (folder 02) contains DriverCandidateProfileResource payloads.
VERIFIED SAFE:
  ✓ passport_reference: EXCLUDED — appears only at init+ (folder 05)
  ✓ home_location.gps: EXCLUDED — locality-level only (Jayanagar, Karnataka)
  ✓ descriptor.name: ANONYMISED — "Driver Profile D-2156"
  ✓ reputation_summary (4.8★, 312 ratings): NOT PII — aggregated network stats
  ✓ credential_summary, training_summary: NOT PII

### Reputation filter in discover intent
`filters` JSONPath: `@.resourceAttributes.reputation_summary.rating_value >= 4.5`
This is a discovery-time filter — BPP filters candidates whose reputation meets threshold before returning the catalog.

### Abbreviated stage progression
APPLICATION_SUBMITTED → OFFER_ISSUED (reputation fast-track, no interview) → HIRING_CONFIRMED

variable.description: Confirm exact value with network registry team
UUID format required by core spec
PII — Driver Passport reference. Disclosed at init and later only.

item.description: Operator filters candidates by role + reputation score ≥ 4.5.

item.name: 02 — on_discover

item.name: 07 — update  ★ OFFER_ISSUED (reputation fast-track)
item.description: Licence verified; reputation score 4.8/5 ≥ threshold — no interview required.
